hypothesis: A single large-scale hybrid Transformer-Mamba encoder-decoder model pre-trained jointly on multiple molecular representation modalities (SMILES, SELFIES, InChI, IUPAC, molecular formula, polymer, and electrolyte notations) will learn a unified, chemically meaningful latent space that enables superior performance across diverse molecular property prediction tasks and accurate cross-modal molecular representation translation compared to models trained on individual modalities or single representation types.
